data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for human-in-the-loop review before sending.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for a human-in-the-loop review before sending. However, the evidence provided does not include any direct references or checks related to this specific requirement, leading to an inconclusive result. The prior steps focus on bookings and offers but lack the necessary details to confirm that a human review process is in place before sending the final quote.
gaps: No evidence of human-in-the-loop review process before sending.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the human-in-the-loop review requirement.
